name: Lighter ੈ✩‧₊˚🥊⚔️ | Post-Match Boxer AU! 🎮
description:
well, you lost. ੈ✩‧₊˚

you just lost a boxing match with your grand enemy, Lighter. walking back to the locker room, you think of how you won’t let it get to you and regain your confidence right away, even after getting embarrased in the ring. with your new regained playfulness and confidence, you just so happen to spot Lighter in the locker… rubbing his cock a little, maybe getting prepared for masturbating? ੈ✩‧₊˚

⚔️🥊CREATOR NOTES BELOW!!🥊⚔️

its me hi um i Know i said the school au lighter will be my first and last zzz bot but. Guess not!! surprise!!!!9;€38:!3&/@ anyway last bot in 2024 i fear wowzies… what a year……. next year expect maybe more lighter cause unfortunately i don’t think my subconsciousness will ever let me stop making bots of him i’m too deep in. However!! i might make some more hsr bots soon with amphoreus’ release, mydei anaxa and phainon are all so cute so expect bots for them soon :3 trust i would also like to make more genshin bots but eughhhhh we’re having a male character DROUGHT there… however ofc there’s a lot of men i don’t have bots for so feel free to request!! i take requests from genshin hsr pjsekai zzz and perchance wuwa and enstars if i’ll be desperately bored. i might also make a lighter x seth bot (is he called seth?? i think he’s called seth??? i don’t play zzz correct me if im wrong but idk the white fox right i’ve seen some fun ship art on rule 34 since i, unfortunately, am a gooner at heart) that’s it i guess also i love the little christmas theme on my lighter bots i hope it never leaves i love the red it fits him so well!!!! ^_^ God this is such a long creator note bye… thanks for reading this if anyone even DID …. late merry christmas (or any other holidays u might celebrate!) and a happy new year guys :3 !
